# STRAT.055 ? Atomic Habits (Clear)

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** performance_excellence
**Domain:** PERFORMANCE_EXCELLENCE
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
1% better daily; systems over goals; identity-based habits; cue-craving-response-reward; make it obvious/easy/attractive/satisfying

## Application
Focus on systems; compound small improvements; become type of person; design environment; habit stacking; 4 laws of behavior change

## Key Values
- Small improvements
- Systems thinking
- Identity focus
- Environment design
- Compound effect
